---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a feature or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What you want

A clear description of the feature.

## Why you want it

What's the workflow problem this solves? What are you doing today that's painful?

## Proposed solution

(Optional) How you imagine this working in the panel.

## Alternatives considered

(Optional) Workarounds you've tried or other ways to solve it.
